backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a blog post CRUD API with in-memory Map storage for BlogPost records containing id, title, slug, category, content, excerpt, readTime, author, publishedDate, tags, and isPublished fields.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration files for the AyurGlow Secrets Ayurvedic remedies application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the AyurGlow Secrets application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, about, three category pages, 15 subcategory remedy pages, blog, admin, legal) and QueryClient provider with staleTime: 0 and refetchOnMount: true.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with AyurGlow Secrets branding, quick links navigation including Privacy Policy and Terms of Service, social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, X, YouTube), and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component providing consistent page structure with Navigation header, main content area, and Footer across all routes.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile menus, active route highlighting, admin link, and integrated search functionality using SearchBar and SearchResults components with proper event handlers and click-outside detection.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Reusable search input component with search icon, clear button, and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarding ref for external focus control.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: A dropdown component that displays filtered remedy search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) and click handling to navigate to selected remedy pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (getAllPosts, getPublishedPosts, getPost, createPost, updatePost, deletePost) that interact with the ICP backend actor and manage cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook that provides search functionality for a hardcoded list of Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords based on user query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic color palette (earth green, sage green, warm brown, cream, gold) defined as CSS variables for both light and dark modes, plus font family definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying the mission, philosophy, and offerings of AyurGlow Secrets with hero section and card-based content layout using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, delete confirmation dialog, and navigation to create/edit post pages using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid layout with category badges, loading states, and navigation to individual post details.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page that displays full post content with metadata (author, date, read time) and category badge, fetched by slug parameter.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Admin form page for creating new blog posts with ReactQuill rich text editor, category selection, metadata fields, and publish toggle using React Query mutation.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Admin page for editing existing blog posts with form fields for title, category, content (ReactQuill editor), excerpt, read time, author, tags, and publish status. Fetches post data by ID and updates via mutation, then navigates back to admin posts list.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Subcategory page for dandruff and scalp care featuring four Ayurvedic remedies (Neem-Tea Tree, Lemon-Yogurt, Fenugreek-Curd, Aloe Vera-Coconut) with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Subcategory page for grey hair solutions presenting four natural remedies (Curry Leaves-Coconut Oil, Amla-Henna, Black Tea-Coffee Rinse, Bhringraj-Brahmi Oil) with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Subcategory page for hair fall treatment showcasing four Ayurvedic remedies (Onion Juice, Fenugreek Seeds, Amla-Shikakai, Curry Leaves-Coconut Oil) with detailed preparation steps, benefits, and recommended application frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component displaying hair growth remedies with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for treatments like castor oil blends, aloe vera masks, egg-yogurt treatments, and hibiscus-curry leaves packs.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component showcasing hair oil and mask treatments including Ayurvedic hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado masks, hibiscus-fenugreek masks, and neem-tulsi scalp treatments with detailed application instructions.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for the Hair Care category displaying five subcategories (Hair Fall Treatment, Hair Growth, Dandruff & Scalp Care, Grey Hair Solutions, Oils & Masks) as clickable cards with icons, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React page component presenting natural remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, featuring fenugreek seed water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedies with usage instructions and health warnings.

React page component providing diabetes and blood pressure support remedies including fenugreek seeds water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon tea, and garlic-ginger remedy with preparation steps, benefits, and medical disclaimer alerts.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page component offering digestive and gut health remedies such as Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, each with ingredients, preparation methods, and Ayurvedic benefits.
Displays four Ayurvedic digestive health remedies (Triphala, Ginger-Lemon, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Alternative immunity remedies page with hero section, back navigation, and four remedies (Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, Chyawanprash) displayed in Card components with preparation instructions and benefits.

Presents four immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash, Amla-Honey) with detailed ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and recommended usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Shows four stress relief and sleep remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender, Almond-Saffron Milk) with ingredients, application methods, benefits, and frequency in a card layout.

Alternative stress and sleep solutions page with hero section, navigation link, and four calming remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender, Almond Milk with Saffron) in Card components.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (lemon-honey water, Triphala-Guggul, ginger-green tea, cabbage-carrot juice) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for the Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity Boosting, Digestion & Gut Health, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP Support, Stress & Sleep Solutions) as clickable cards with icons and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with hero section featuring Ayurvedic branding, a 'What We Offer' section showcasing four service categories (Health, Skin Care, Hair Care, Wellness), and a benefits section highlighting the natural Ayurvedic approach.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static privacy policy page with sections for Introduction, Information We Collect (automatically collected and user-provided data), displayed in card components with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Presents four herbal acne treatment remedies (neem-turmeric, tea tree oil, sandalwood-rose water, aloe vera-lemon) with a hero section, back navigation, and detailed cards showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Shows four Ayurvedic acne remedies (neem-turmeric paste, tea tree-aloe spot treatment, sandalwood-rosewater pack, cinnamon-honey mask) with icons, ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and recommended frequency in a grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Displays four anti-aging skincare remedies (almond-saffron serum, avocado-honey mask, rose water-glycerin tonic, papaya-yogurt mask) with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits focused on wrinkle reduction and skin rejuvenation, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Presents five DIY face pack recipes (multani mitti, besan-turmeric, oatmeal-honey, sandalwood-rose, banana-honey) categorized by skin type, with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and recommended frequency in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: React component displaying four natural glow remedies (Turmeric-Yogurt, Saffron-Milk, Aloe Vera-Rose Water, Papaya-Honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for each treatment.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: React component with hero section and four pigmentation remedies (Lemon-Honey, Potato-Cucumber, Almond-Milk, Orange Peel-Yogurt) displayed in cards with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.

React component showing four pigmentation reduction remedies (Lemon-Honey, Potato-Cucumber, Saffron-Milk, Orange Peel-Yogurt) with sun protection warning and detailed treatment information including icons, ingredients, and application instructions.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for the Skin Care category displaying a hero section and a grid of five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) with icons, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of Service page with a hero section, medical disclaimer alert, and expandable cards covering agreement to terms, use of website, and other legal provisions with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic color palette (earth-green, sage-green, warm-brown, cream, gold), extended theme settings for borders, shadows, fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project metadata for AyurGlow Secrets wellness website tracking 27 versions, architectural notes about content structure and SEO optimization, known issue with blog posts not displaying, and list of existing features including homepage, about page, and content categories.
